app.subtitle: Unconscious pattern analysis
app.name: Ozero's Mirror
app.tagline: Training to separate fact from delusion in your own record.

measure.guide1: No need to write well. It doesn't have to be sentences.
measure.guide2: Write whatever comes up. If swearing comes up, write the swearing.
measure.guide3: Don't edit. Don't censor. Pour it out.
measure.guide4: There is no right or wrong writing. This record is not saved.
measure.factDef: A fact is what actually happened. What a camera would capture, what a recorder would record, what can be verified, what anyone would state the same way.
measure.delusionDef: A delusion is a story — an interpretation. The markers: adjectives, judgments, guesses, conclusions. A delusion is neither good nor bad. It is an indicator of how you interpret the world, and why.
measure.tagAll: Sort every piece before holding it up to the mirror.
measure.toMirror: Hold it up to the mirror
measure.yourSplit: You sorted this as fact {f} : delusion {d}.
measure.unclear: Which side would you place this on?

save.prompt: Would you like to keep this mirror?
save.hint: Get an Ozero ID and today's mirror is saved. No address, no password.
save.existing: I already have an Ozero ID
save.timeLabel: When the mirror opens each day
save.doneTime: The mirror opens at {t} each day.
save.codeInvalid: That ID format is not right. Example: o023
save.codeTaken: That ID is already registered. If you're new, get a fresh ID.
save.failed: Could not save. Please try again.

me.title: My mirror
me.none: You don't have an Ozero ID yet.
me.deliverAt: The mirror opens at {t} each day.

today.building: Today's dial — built in the next step.
